\tzpentry{ID11374}{Higher-Topos Morphism Class}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The n-level morphisms of the higher-topos carrier are represented as higher hom objects spanning TZP, Einstein, quantum, and neural sectors.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\mathrm{Morphisms}_{n}:=\mathrm{Hom}^{(n)}[\mathrm{TZP},\mathrm{Einstein},\mathrm{Quantum},\mathrm{Neural}]
